channel.title: Announcements on Apache Texera
channel.description: Recent content in Announcements on Apache Texera

item.title: Apache Texera 1.1.0-incubating released
item.description:
We are pleased to announce the release of Apache Texera 1.1.0-incubating — the first release of Apache Texera as an Apache Incubator project.

This release focuses on Apache Incubator compliance and introduces a major new capability for AI-assisted workflow construction: TexeraAgent, an LLM agent that helps users construct workflows using natural-language instructions.

Highlights

  • TexeraAgent — natural-language workflow construction powered by LLMs
  • ASF license headers, asf.yaml, NOTICE, and DISCLAIMER for incubator compliance
  • Resolved outstanding license compliance issues
  • System repositioning to “Human-AI Collaborative Data Science Using Visual Workflows”

Get the release

  • Release notes and download artifacts
  • Source distribution on Apache mirrors
  • Git tag v1.1.0-incubating
  • Quick Start

item.title: dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon
item.description:
The dkNET-AI · Apache Texera Agent Hackathon brought together researchers, students, and data enthusiasts at UC Irvine from May 14–18, 2026 for an intensive four-day sprint focused on human-AI collaborative data science.

Hosted by the NIH dkNET project and the Apache Texera team, the event challenged participants to build intuitive, visual workflows in which advanced AI agents co-author data pipelines alongside humans.

By the numbers

  • 23 active participants
  • 46 hours of non-stop hacking
  • 35 total project submissions (33 accepted for formal evaluation)

Read the full recap on the blog →
